title: Bench Work
description: Benchmark-only node (NOT part of RocketRide; safe to delete). Per object, performs controllable synthetic work — CPU busy-loop, sleep, blocking HTTP GET, or none — selected by env (BENCH_MODE). Reads the filesys/dropper 'tags' lane directly (no parse/Tika). Emits one RRBENCH stderr line per call with perf+epoch start/end, OS thread id, and pid for span/overlap/parallelism analysis.
